/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -Wno-deprecated-builtins -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/Optimizer.dir/Optimizer/Optimizer.cpp.o -o optimizer  libPaymentGate.a libRpc.a libHttp.a libCryptoNoteCore.a libLogging.a libCommon.a libCrypto.a libSystem.a -lrt libSerialization.a -ljsoncpp -lresolv libSwapDaemonLib.a libCommon.a libP2P.a ../external/miniupnpc/libminiupnpc.a libTransfers.a libBlockchainExplorer.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_serialization.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_coroutine.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_context.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0 -lrt -ljsoncpp
